name: Fat Free Caesar Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ricotta cheese, Dijon mustard, Worcestershire sauce, minced garlic, lemon juice, anchovies, salt, and pepper in a blender.
2. Blend until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Gradually add non-fat milk to achieve the desired consistency.
4. Toss the dressing with the romaine lettuce leaves.
5. Garnish with homemade croutons.
